title: Anthony Lee recap of TechCon SoCal 2026 panel featuring Errol Arkilic
snippet: Honored to join an outstanding group of leaders at the 2026 TechCon SoCal conference hosted by San Diego State University for a discussion on 'Regional Innovation Engines: Universities, Tech Transfer, and Ecosystem Building.' title: Latency is now low enough to support robot inference in the cloud
snippet: Agreed: Latency is now low enough to support robot inference in the cloud, and edge is where embodiment lives. Ken Goldberg (@Ken_Goldberg) commenting on cloud vs edge compute for robot AI inference.

title: Dennis Assanis Formally Inaugurated as UCSB Chancellor — Rita Raley quoted as Academic Senate head
snippet: Rita Raley, head of UCSB's Academic Senate, said faculty told the search committee that they wanted a leader who understands the importance of shared governance, 'guiding the community by counsel rather than command.' They also wanted someone who understands UCSB's research and teaching mission.
match_reason: websearch (press_quote) — Rita Raley is quoted by name as UCSB Academic Senate Chair speaking at the chancellor's inauguration; her role includes AI governance work at UCSB, though the direct AI angle here is secondary.

title: AI Steering Committee Members - UC AI Council
snippet: The AI Steering Committee advances the University of California's role in shaping the future of artificial intelligence by bringing together leaders from academia, healthcare, industry and public service to leverage the unmatched scale, research breadth, and public mission of the UC system. Steering Committee Co-Chairs: Pradeep Khosla, Chancellor, UC San Diego; Ahmet Palazoglu, UC Academic Senate
